name: Paul's Brunswick Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Cream Style Corn (16 oz each)
recipeInstructions: Combine all ingredients in a Crock-Pot. Stir well. Cover and cook on low setting for 4 to 9 hours. Add more chicken broth after cooking, if desired. Season to taste before serving with salt, pepper, Tabasco sauce, and Worcestershire sauce. The longer the stew cooks, the better the flavor.
